\section{Introduction}
\label{sec:intro}

This is the introduction. We reference Figure~\ref{fig:diagram} and
Equation~\eqref{eq:euler}. See also~\cite{Einstein1905}.

\begin{equation}
  e^{i\pi} + 1 = 0
  \label{eq:euler}
\end{equation}
